challenges.title: Page Layout
challenges.description: Create a page structure using div elements with class attributes for header, content, sidebar, and footer sections. Each div should contain at least one heading or paragraph. Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Create a page layout using div elements with class attributes -->
<!-- Include header, content, sidebar, and footer sections -->

"""
challenges.test_code: assert html.lower().count('= 4, 'Should contain at least 4 div elements' assert html.lower().count('') >= 4, 'Should close all div elements' assert 'class="header"' in html.lower() or 'class="head' in html.lower(), 'Should have a div with a header class' assert 'class="content"' in html.lower() or 'class="main' in html.lower(), 'Should have a div with a content or main class' assert 'class="sidebar"' in html.lower() or 'class="side' in html.lower(), 'Should have a div with a sidebar class' assert 'class="footer"' in html.lower() or 'class="foot' in html.lower(), 'Should have a div with a footer class'
hints: Add headings or paragraphs inside each div to give them content
The class attribute names should describe the purpose of each section

challenges.title: Card Layout
challenges.description: Create at least 3 div-based 'card' elements, each with a class of 'card'. Each card should contain an h3 heading, a paragraph, and an anchor link. Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Create at least 3 card divs -->
<!-- Each card should contain an h3, a paragraph, and a link -->

"""
challenges.test_code: assert html.lower().count('class="card"') >= 3, 'Should contain at least 3 elements with class="card"' assert html.lower().count('= 3, 'Each card should contain an h3 heading' assert html.lower().count('') >= 3, 'Should close all h3 elements' assert html.lower().count('= 3, 'Each card should contain a paragraph' assert html.lower().count('= 3, 'Each card should contain a link' assert html.lower().count('href=') >= 3, 'Each link should have an href attribute'
hints: Create each card as <div class="card"> with content inside

Include an

, a

, and an in each card
You can wrap all cards in a container div if you like
